posts.title: Portfolio Inception
posts.content:
Concentrated positions in enduring businesses. The portfolio favors quality over diversification—companies with durable competitive advantages, pricing power, and proven survival across economic cycles.

The barbell approach: long-term equity positions paired with tactical volatility strategies. Equity holdings are buy-and-hold; options are short-duration bets on mispriced volatility.

Current positioning reflects conviction in luxury goods resilience and a constructive view on equity vol remaining elevated through Q1 2026.
